SELECT IBVersion, PlatformVersionReq FROM IBVersion
select datcollate from pg_database where datname = current_database()
select spcname from pg_tablespace where spcname = 'v81c_index' or spcname = 'v81c_data';
select 1 from pg_proc where proname in ('datediff2')
SELECT 1 FROM pg_catalog.pg_type as t WHERE typname = 'mchar' AND pg_catalog.pg_type_is_visible(t.oid);
select installed_version from pg_available_extensions where name = 'mchar'
select installed_version from pg_available_extensions where name = 'fasttrun'
select installed_version from pg_available_extensions where name = 'fulleq'
select 1 from pg_proc where proname = 'vassn'
select count(*) from pg_tables where tablename IN ('config', 'configsave', 'params', 'files')
select count(*) from pg_tables where tablename IN ('dbschema', 'dbschemaog')
SELECT 1::INT8 FROM PG_CLASS WHERE pg_catalog.pg_table_is_visible(OID) AND RELKIND='r' AND RELNAME='ibversion' and relnamespace IN('public'::regnamespace, pg_my_temp_schema()) LIMIT 1
SELECT T1._IDRRef FROM _Reference15 T1 WHERE T1._Marked = $1
SELECT T1._IDRRef, T1._Code, T1._Description FROM _Reference15 T1 WHERE T1._Fld1234RRef = $1 AND T1._Marked = $2 ORDER BY T1._Code
SELECT * FROM _Reference15 T1 WHERE T1._Description LIKE $1
SELECT * FROM _Document70 T1 WHERE T1._Date_Time >= $1 AND T1._Date_Time < $2 AND T1._Posted = $3
SELECT T1._IDRRef, T1._Date_Time, T1._Number FROM _Document70 T1 INNER JOIN _Reference15 T2 ON T1._Fld7001RRef = T2._IDRRef WHERE T1._Posted = $1 ORDER BY T1._Date_Time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _Document70 T1 WHERE T1._Posted = $1 AND T1._Date_Time >= $2
SELECT T1._IDRRef FROM _Document70 T1 WHERE T1._IDRRef NOT IN (SELECT T2._Fld7001RRef FROM _Reference15 T2 WHERE T2._Marked = $1)
SELECT T1._IDRRef, T1._Fld1234, T1._Fld1235 FROM _InfoRg30 T1 WHERE T1._Period = $1 AND T1._Fld1233RRef = $2
SELECT T1._RecordKind, T1._Period, SUM(T1._Fld5001) AS Summa FROM _AccumRg5000 T1 WHERE T1._Period >= $1 AND T1._Period < $2 GROUP BY T1._RecordKind, T1._Period
SELECT T1._IDRRef FROM _Reference15 T1 WHERE T1._Description LIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
SELECT T1._IDRRef, T1._Code FROM _Reference42 T1 WHERE T1._Fld888RRef = $1 AND T1._Marked = $2 AND T1._IsFolder = $3
SELECT * FROM _Reference15 T1 LEFT JOIN _Reference42 T2 ON T1._Fld100RRef = T2._IDRRef WHERE T1._Marked = $1

SELECT T1._IDRRef, T2._Code, T2._Description FROM _Document70 T1 INNER JOIN _Reference15 T2 ON T1._Fld7001RRef = T2._IDRRef INNER JOIN _Reference42 T3 ON T1._Fld7002RRef = T3._IDRRef WHERE T1._Date_Time >= $1
UPDATE _Reference15 SET _Marked = $1 WHERE _IDRRef = $2
INSERT INTO _InfoRg30 (_Period, _Fld1233RRef, _Fld1234, _Fld1235) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
DELETE FROM _AccumRgT5000 WHERE _Period < $1
SELECT T1._IDRRef FROM _Reference15 T1 WHERE T1._Code IN (SELECT T2._Fld999 FROM _Document70 T2 WHERE T2._Posted = $1 AND T2._Date_Time >= $2)
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM _Document70 WHERE _IDRRef = $1 AND _Posted = $2
SELECT T1._IDRRef, T1._Fld1001, T1._Fld1002, T1._Fld1003, T1._Fld1004, T1._Fld1005 FROM _Reference88 T1 WHERE T1._Fld1000RRef = $1 ORDER BY T1._Fld1001
SELECT T1._Period, T1._Fld5001, T1._Fld5002 FROM _AccumRg5000 T1 WHERE T1._Recorder = $1 ORDER BY T1._Period
SELECT T1._IDRRef FROM _Reference15 T1 WHERE T1._Fld321 LIKE $1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _Document70 T1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM _Reference15 T2 WHERE T2._IDRRef = T1._Fld7001RRef AND T2._Marked = $1)
